title: pilosella nigricarina
intro: Pilosella nigricarina, also known as Black Spleenwort or Black Knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella nigricarina include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a popular remedy for various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
